#77 Block indent across pages

Use EPUB block display, left orientation, and font size 12. Page until the indented lines cross a screen boundary.

Indent here

Indent there

Indent everywhere

All of these lines have indents including this one.

Expected: if an indented line starts at the top of a screen, it still keeps its indent and stays on its own line.

Regression: the first top-screen line was not indented and the next indented text was attached to it.
